method: Operate the entire interface using only the keyboard, confirming all interactive elements are reachable and operable, focus order is logical, and no keyboard traps exist (WCAG 2.1.1, 2.1.2, 2.4.3).
expected_output: Traversal log of focus order, list of unreachable or inoperable controls, and any detected keyboard traps. Complex widgets may still need human confirmation.
